claims.supporting_quote: Autoantibodies to β-cell specific antigens are markers of type 1 diabetes...Participants with type 1 diabetes (n = 183) and controls (n = 49) were matched for age...The prevalence of ZnT8 autoantibody positivity was 17.5% (32 of 183) in participants with type 1 diabetes.

coverage_notes: Manually grounded by Claude reading Stage3b abstracts directly.
